subcodes.first_line: Praise, sanctified beyond the comprehension of the world and the recognition of nations, befitteth the court of glory of His all-compelling Presence, Who through the Pen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ادراک عالم و عرفان امم ساحت عز حضرت کبریائی را لایق و سزا که بقلم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for forgiveness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih
